_meta.documents: W-2 (2024) + W-2 (2025) + most-recent pay stubs + IRS Form 4506-C transcript
_meta.purpose: Lender must verify the income claimed on Form 1003 against (a) employer-issued W-2s, (b) most-recent paychecks, and (c) IRS transcripts (via signed 4506-C authorizing the lender to pull). Three sources = fraud-resistant. The Dodd-Frank QM rule REQUIRES documented Ability-to-Repay (ATR).

employee.name: Maria L Rodriguez
employee.address: 2150 Stanton Ave Apt 12, Castro Valley CA 94546

irs_form_4506c_transcript.form: IRS Form 4506-C — IVES Request for Transcript of Tax Return
irs_form_4506c_transcript.status: Returned 2026-05-17 — matches submitted W-2s within $0.00 tolerance
irs_form_4506c_transcript.purpose: This is THE definitive income verification. Borrower can't show forged W-2s if IRS transcripts confirm the same numbers. Required on every loan that goes through Desktop Underwriter.

qualifying_income_calculation.notes: Per Fannie Mae Selling Guide B3-3.1-01: borrower with 2+ years of consistent W-2 employment uses 24-month average. RSU income excluded — not guaranteed future.
